locator.waitFor: Timeout 5000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for locator('input#search, textarea#search, input[name="search_query"]').first() to be visible[22m

explanation.whatHappened: A safe UI interaction failed during execution.
explanation.whyItFailed:
locator.waitFor: Timeout 5000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for locator('input#search, textarea#search, input[name="search_query"]').first() to be visible[22m
explanation.whyItMatters: Interaction failures hide downstream UI states and reduce coverage confidence.
recommendedFix: Verify target control remains visible and actionable.
Check for overlays or route changes interrupting the interaction.

uiuxGroupedIssues.whyItFailed: Control "Sign out" has min hit size 18px.

explanation.whatHappened: A mobile/tablet control has undersized tap area.
explanation.whyItFailed: Control "Sign out" has min hit size 18px.
explanation.whyItMatters: Small targets cause mistaps and failed task completion.
recommendedFix: Increase target hit area on touch viewports.
Maintain minimum interactive target dimensions.

rawDetectorResult.summary: Control "Sign out" has min hit size 18px.
rawDetectorResult.reasoning: Touch controls should provide at least ~40px hit area on mobile and tablet viewports.
recommendedFix: Increase target hit area on touch viewports.
Maintain minimum interactive target dimensions.

llmJudgment.summary: Control "Sign out" has min hit size 18px.
llmJudgment.reasoning: No model-level semantic override was provided; using deterministic detector judgment fallback.
recommendedFix: Increase target hit area on touch viewports.
Maintain minimum interactive target dimensions.

calibratedJudgment.summary: Control "Sign out" has min hit size 18px.
calibratedJudgment.reasoning: No model-level semantic override was provided; using deterministic detector judgment fallback.
recommendedFix: Increase target hit area on touch viewports.
Maintain minimum interactive target dimensions.
